full_description: Count the green target blocks on the table, then collect exactly those target blocks into the collection bin.
schema: {A} denotes the green target blocks, {B} denotes the collection bin, {a} denotes the arm used to collect the blocks, {x} denotes the number of green target blocks
preference: Mention counting the target objects first and collecting exactly the target objects into the container.
seen: Count {A}, then put exactly those {x} blocks into {B}.
Scan the table for green blocks and collect the {x} targets into the collection bin.
Find how many {A} are present, then place all target blocks into {B}.
Use {a} to move each green target block into {B} after counting them.
Count the target blocks first, then gather only those blocks into the collection bin.
unseen: Count the green blocks and collect them into the collection bin.
After counting {A}, place the {x} target blocks into {B}.
Gather only the green target blocks into {B}.
look around to count the green target blocks

seen: pick a counted target block with {a}

unseen: put the green block in the collection bin
